candidates.row_label: Petroleum and natural gas sales including royalty revenue
candidates.why: Top-line gross sales/revenue line near top of income statement.

candidates.row_label: Petroleum and natural gas revenue, net of royalties
candidates.why: More precise reported revenue line after deducting royalties; appears as the main net revenue measure and is listed near the top.

final_choice.row_label: Petroleum and natural gas revenue, net of royalties
Petroleum and natural gas sales including royalty revenue

variables.notes: Using a priority list for revenue labels across periods. Prefer the net revenue line over the gross sales line including royalty revenue.

Candidate list was empty. Chose 'Direct operating' from the full preview because it is the clearest direct production/service cost line and best matches COGS/cost of sales for an oil and gas producer.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-type overhead row; populated and clearly an operating overhead component.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists and is populated, so selected only that row per hierarchy. Did not add share-based compensation separately to avoid double counting.
No dedicated research and development line appears in the income statement preview.

candidates.why: Direct interest expense line; preferred core financing cost item.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring interest component on lease liabilities; should be included with financing costs if separate.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Looks like a duplicate supplemental disclosure of lease interest, so lower preference than the main row.
Balancing row and should be avoided when the named interest expense row exists.
Net finance result, but less preferred than granular interest expense rows and mixes income with expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Selected granular recurring finance cost rows and excluded balancing/net rows to avoid double counting. Excluded the supplemental lease-interest row as duplicative.

candidates.why: Direct book equity line attributable to shareholders; preferred over Total Equity when no separate NCI is shown.
Also a valid equity total, but less preferred because Shareholders Equity is more specific and identical here.

variables.notes: Using a priority list. Prefer 'Shareholders Equity' because it is the more specific owner equity label. 'Total Equity' is a fallback only.
No minority interest/non-controlling interest line appears on the balance sheet preview.
